title: Impresario Entertainment Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Impresario Entertainment Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Impresario Entertainment Asia Pacific Associates is actively seeking a talented and motivated Guest Relations Manager to join our dynamic team in Kolkata. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Impresario Entertainment Asia Pacific Associates:
Impresario Entertainment Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in HACCP

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Impresario Entertainment Asia Pacific Associates!
